title: Bounded Recurrence And Invariant Checks

solver_reuse.target: bounded recurrence bad-transition and bad-invariant QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds

graduation_criteria: Encode bounded recurrence traces as deterministic LRA/BV transition systems.
